purpose: hipEngine-local rocprofv3 selected-region Amdahl baseline for docs/OPTIMIZE.md M.3/M.4
profile_method: rocprofv3 --kernel-trace --selected-regions, with qwen35_paro_bench.py calling roctxProfilerResume/Pause around prefill and measured_decode_graph. This avoids rocprofiler marker-trace finalization asserts seen with HIP graph replay.
